rationale: The defining property is 'a non-logical symbol of arity n >= 1', so def:arity is the load-bearing concept and was missing. Added.
notes: def:constant-symbol is kept but flagged: a function symbol and a constant symbol are siblings (non-logical symbols differing by arity), not one depending on the other -- same chaining pattern as 0063. Reviewer to decide. 'forms terms f(t_1,...,t_n)' -> def:term is a candidate. Duplicate node def:signature-function-symbol also exists (dedup candidate).
